ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the data point (1-4) */,
  "dpi" REAL /* Disposable personal income (DPI) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross domestic product (GDP) */,
  "pce" REAL /* Personal consumption expenditures (PCE) */,
  "cp" REAL /* Consumer price index (CP) */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time period (1-...) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the data point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the data source was checked for updates */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule applied (e.g., missing values, outliers) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
